title: Chloe vs. History
subtitle: Excellent use of AI to create relatively accurate and realistic tours through history. Chloe is an engaging and personable guide–a fact of some importance. Hat tip: Kevin Bryan. The post Chloe vs. History appeared first on Marginal REVOLUTION .
contentHtml:
Excellent use of AI to create relatively accurate and realistic tours through history. Chloe is an engaging and personable guide–a fact of some importance.

Hat tip: Kevin Bryan.
